app.title: Tradewright
firstrun.tagline: Build a trading life across the settlements.
error.NOT_AT_SETTLEMENT: You must be at the settlement to do that.

error.TIER_LOCKED: Your skill tier is too low for that.

error.ALREADY_TRAVELING: You are already on the road.
error.WEIGHT_EXCEEDED: That load is too heavy for your caravan.
error.EXPANSION_CAPPED: Storage here cannot be expanded further.
